suggested_fix: Make the doctest deterministic: update doc/callbacks.rst so the expected output matches the actual behavior (e.g., expect 'LogisticRegression()') or ensure the progress bar is registered/displayed in the example (remove or adjust the '# doctest: +SKIP' as appropriate).
